# Tentiq

> Hackathon UX A/B testing platform for AI agents, developers, and human testers. Agents create funded campaigns, testers run assigned variants, and Tentiq returns structured metrics so the agent can choose the best UX.

Tentiq lets an AI coding agent submit pages that need A/B testing while a service is being developed. Human testers receive a campaign, complete a task on one random variant, and the platform records UX metrics such as clicks, duration, completion, friction score, and per-variant results.

This is a live hackathon prototype. Prefer the OpenAPI schema for exact request validation.

## Public URLs

```text
Backend API:       http://178.104.210.8:8000
OpenAPI JSON:      http://178.104.210.8:8000/openapi.json
Interactive docs:  http://178.104.210.8:8000/docs
Tester frontend:   http://178.104.210.8:8001/?sessionId=<session-id>
Static demo app:   http://178.104.210.8:8002/index_new.html
Browser SDK:       http://178.104.210.8:8000/peach-sdk1.js
LLM guide:         http://178.104.210.8:8000/llms.txt
```

The static app directory also serves `peach-sdk1.js` and `llms.txt` on port `8002`.

## Core Concepts

**Campaign**: A paid UX test created by an agent. It contains URL variants, a budget in satoshis, requested number of tests, a success event, and a tester task.

**Variant**: One URL/version of the tested page. Metrics are grouped by variant so the agent can compare A/B performance.

**Tester assignment**: `GET /api/user/current_variant` returns one campaign the current prototype user has not used yet, plus one random variant from that campaign.

**Completion**: `POST /api/user/completed_task` records task metrics, links them to the variant, and sends a Lightning payout to the tester wallet.

**Payment**: Campaign creation returns a Lightning invoice. The agent pays it, then calls `POST /api/agent/payment_status`. Campaigns become available to testers only after payment status is `settled`.

## Agent Workflow

```text
1. POST /api/agent/campaigns
   Create an A/B test campaign and receive a Lightning invoice.

2. Pay payment_invoice with a Lightning/NWC wallet.

3. POST /api/agent/payment_status
   Confirm that the campaign invoice is settled.

4. Human testers use the runner at http://178.104.210.8:8001/?sessionId=<id>.

5. GET /api/agent/completed_campaign
   Poll for progress and final analytics. When completed_tests >= required_tests,
   successed is true and per-variant metrics are ready for the AI agent.
```

## Agent API

### Create Campaign

```http
POST /api/agent/campaigns
Content-Type: application/json
```

Request:

```json
{
  "variants": [
    {
      "name": "Variant A",
      "link": "http://178.104.210.8:8002/index_new.html"
    },
    {
      "name": "Variant B",
      "link": "https://example.com/checkout-b"
    }
  ],
  "budget": 1000,
  "number_of_tests": 5,
  "success_event": "task_completed",
  "task": "Open the homepage, try to complete checkout, and report anything confusing. Stop after reaching the final confirmation screen."
}
```

Response:

```json
{
  "id": "d7c03b8d-0374-410e-be70-2b2aa75e0cac",
  "campaign_id": "d7c03b8d-0374-410e-be70-2b2aa75e0cac",
  "variants": [
    {
      "id": "47f3bff9-0000-0000-0000-000000000000",
      "name": "Variant A",
      "link": "http://178.104.210.8:8002/index_new.html"
    }
  ],
  "budget": 1000,
  "number_of_tests": 5,
  "success_event": "task_completed",
  "task": "Open the homepage...",
  "payment_invoice": "lnbc...",
  "payment_hash": "31db7a53acff9e2d...",
  "payment_status": "pending"
}
```

Save `campaign_id`, `payment_invoice`, and `payment_hash`.

### Check Campaign Payment

```http
POST /api/agent/payment_status
Content-Type: application/json
```

Request:

```json
{
  "campaign_id": "d7c03b8d-0374-410e-be70-2b2aa75e0cac",
  "payment_hash": "31db7a53acff9e2d..."
}
```

Response:

```json
{
  "campaign_id": "d7c03b8d-0374-410e-be70-2b2aa75e0cac",
  "payment_hash": "31db7a53acff9e2d...",
  "payment_status": "settled"
}
```

Only settled campaigns are returned to testers.

### Get One Available Settled Campaign

```http
GET /api/agent/campaigns
```

Returns the oldest settled campaign with its variants. This is primarily an internal/prototype helper.

### Poll Campaign Completion And Analytics

```http
GET /api/agent/completed_campaign
```

Returns all settled campaigns with completion progress and metrics.

Example response:

```json
[
  {
    "campaign_id": "74492beb-aa07-4d52-8930-a0c664489349",
    "successed": true,
    "completed_tests": 5,
    "required_tests": 5,
    "success_event": "task_completed",
    "task": "Open the homepage and test checkout.",
    "metrics": {
      "numeric_averages": {
        "clicks": 6.4,
        "duration_ms": 42000,
        "friction_score": 0.8
      },
      "numeric_totals": {
        "clicks": 32,
        "duration_ms": 210000,
        "friction_score": 4
      },
      "raw": [
        {
          "clicks": 6,
          "completed": true,
          "duration_ms": 39000,
          "friction_score": 1
        }
      ]
    },
    "variants": [
      {
        "variant_id": "e4fc8d47-0a75-4a71-8547-1291f4947b6d",
        "variant_name": "Variant A",
        "variant_link": "http://178.104.210.8:8002/index_new.html",
        "completed_tests": 3,
        "numeric_averages": {
          "clicks": 5.3,
          "duration_ms": 38000,
          "friction_score": 0.3
        },
        "numeric_totals": {
          "clicks": 16,
          "duration_ms": 114000,
          "friction_score": 1
        },
        "metrics": [
          {
            "clicks": 5,
            "completed": true,
            "duration_ms": 37000,
            "friction_score": 0
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
]
```

Interpretation:

- `successed` is `true` when `completed_tests >= required_tests`.
- `metrics.numeric_averages` summarizes numeric fields across the whole campaign.
- `variants[]` groups the same metrics by tested variant.
- Lower `duration_ms`, lower `friction_score`, fewer unnecessary `clicks`, and higher `completed` rates usually indicate a better UX. The agent should compare these values per variant.

## Tester API

### Get Current Variant

```http
GET /api/user/current_variant
```

Prototype behavior: the backend currently assumes `user_id = "1"`. It returns one campaign that user has not used before and assigns a random variant.

Response:

```json
{
  "campaign_id": "74492beb-aa07-4d52-8930-a0c664489349",
  "variant": {
    "id": "e4fc8d47-0a75-4a71-8547-1291f4947b6d",
    "name": "Variant A",
    "link": "http://178.104.210.8:8002/index_new.html"
  },
  "success_event": "task_completed",
  "task": "Open the homepage and test checkout."
}
```

### Complete Task

```http
POST /api/user/completed_task
Content-Type: application/json
```

Request:

```json
{
  "campaign_id": "74492beb-aa07-4d52-8930-a0c664489349",
  "user_id": "1",
  "variant_id": "e4fc8d47-0a75-4a71-8547-1291f4947b6d",
  "variant_name": "Variant A",
  "metrics": {
    "clicks": 8,
    "completed": true,
    "duration_ms": 55000,
    "friction_score": 1
  },
  "success_event": "task_completed"
}
```

Behavior:

- Requires campaign `payment_status` to be `settled`.
- Stores completion metrics linked to `campaign_id`, `variant_id`, and/or `variant_name`.
- Pays the tester wallet `nwc1777195149882@getalby.com`.
- Payout amount is `campaign.budget // campaign.number_of_tests` sats.
- Repeated paid completions for the same `campaign_id + user_id` return the existing paid completion to avoid duplicate payout.

Response includes payout state:

```json
{
  "id": "completion-id",
  "campaign_id": "74492beb-aa07-4d52-8930-a0c664489349",
  "user_id": "1",
  "variant_id": "e4fc8d47-0a75-4a71-8547-1291f4947b6d",
  "variant_name": "Variant A",
  "metrics": {
    "clicks": 8,
    "completed": true,
    "duration_ms": 55000,
    "friction_score": 1
  },
  "success_event": "task_completed",
  "payout_sats": 200,
  "payout_status": "paid",
  "payout_preimage": "preimage...",
  "payout_ln_address": "nwc1777195149882@getalby.com"
}
```

## Frontend Runner

Open:

```text
http://178.104.210.8:8001/?sessionId=<unique-session-id>
```

The runner:

1. Calls `/api/current-campaign` on the Next.js frontend.
2. That proxies to backend `GET /api/user/current_variant`.
3. Loads the returned variant URL in an iframe.
4. Adds query params: `campaignId`, `variant`, `sessionId`, and `apiUrl`.
5. Receives SDK `postMessage` events from the iframe.
6. On `task_completed`, posts metrics to backend `POST /api/user/completed_task`.

## Browser SDK

Use the current SDK URL:

```html
<script src="http://178.104.210.8:8000/peach-sdk1.js"></script>
```

The SDK defines `window.AgentSplit`.

Initialize it on the tested page:

```html
<script>
  AgentSplit.init({
    campaignId: new URLSearchParams(location.search).get("campaignId"),
    sessionId: new URLSearchParams(location.search).get("sessionId"),
    variant_name: new URLSearchParams(location.search).get("variant"),
    apiUrl: new URLSearchParams(location.search).get("apiUrl"),
    successEvent: "task_completed",
    debug: false
  });
</script>
```

Auto-tracked behavior:

- `page_view`
- `click`
- `form_submit`
- `javascript_error`
- `unhandled_rejection`
- `route_change`

Current metric snapshot:

```json
{
  "clicks": 14,
  "completed": true,
  "duration_ms": 47200,
  "friction_score": 0
}
```

Call this when the tester reaches the goal:

```js
AgentSplit.completeTask({
  final_url: window.location.href,
  note: "Reached confirmation page"
});
```

Every SDK event is sent by `postMessage` to the parent iframe runner:

```json
{
  "source": "agentsplit",
  "type": "event",
  "data": {
    "campaign_id": "campaign-id",
    "campaignId": "campaign-id",
    "sessionId": "session-id",
    "variant": "Variant A",
    "variant_name": "Variant A",
    "event": "task_completed",
    "payload": {},
    "metrics": {
      "clicks": 8,
      "completed": true,
      "duration_ms": 55000,
      "friction_score": 1
    },
    "success_event": "task_completed"
  }
}
```

If `apiUrl` is set, the SDK also posts to `apiUrl + "/events"`. In the current runner this points at the frontend API (`http://178.104.210.8:8001/api/events`).

## Payment Notes

- Campaign invoices are created by backend `POST /api/agent/campaigns`.
- The backend uses a platform NWC wallet to create invoices and send tester payouts.
- Testers are paid to `nwc1777195149882@getalby.com` in the current prototype.
- `POST /payments/invoices` exists as an older prototype endpoint and does not drive the main campaign funding flow. Use `POST /api/agent/campaigns` instead.

## Health Check

```http
GET /health
```

Response:

```json
{ "status": "ok" }
```

## Good Task Prompt Style

Tasks are displayed directly to testers. Good tasks are short, specific, and include a stopping condition.

Good:

```text
Find the cheapest business checking account. Navigate to the comparison page and stop before signing up. Report anything confusing.
```

Bad:

```text
Test the checkout.
```
